---
id: execute-device-command
title: "通过 Command 控制设备"
description: "通过 Command 实现对设备的功能控制。"
sidebar_label: "通过 Command 控制设备"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"通过 Command 控制设备"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/command/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



通过 Command 实现对设备的功能控制。    
所需 endpointId、functionCode、commandCode、fieldCode 等参数请先通过 /devices/definitions 接口获取后传入本接口进行执行。


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"请求签名。如需了解签名生成方法，请参考 [Sign 生成规则](https://opendoc.aqara.cn/docs/%E4%BA%91%E5%BC%80%E5%8F%91/API%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97/Sign%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99.html)。"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID。"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码，如：\n- NetworkCommissioning\n"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"命令编码，如：\n- TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload\n"},"args":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["fieldCode","value"],"properties":{"fieldCode":{"type":"string","description":"commandCode Field的filedCode"},"value":{"description":"参数值（推荐按对应 field 的 parameter.type 选择值类型）","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"CommandArg"},"description":"command"}},"title":"CommandExecuteItem"}}},"title":"CommandExecuteRequest"},"examples":{"executeCommand":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","args":[{"fieldCode":"InstallCode","value":"F9B34846413AB5DE81B60E63E440"},{"fieldCode":"MAC","value":"54EF441000EB0CCF"}]}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功，但不代表所有 command 执行成功。<br />code 为 0 表示至少部分成功；code 不为 0 表示全部失败。<br/>若 data 存在，表示为执行失败的 command 集合，若无则全部成功。","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型。"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本。","example":"v4"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID。"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功。"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息。"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","description":"data 集合元素为执行失败的 command 数据","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode","code","message"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID。"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID。"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码。"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"命令编码。"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"错误码。"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"错误信息。"}},"title":"CommandExecuteResult"}}}}],"example":{"type":"ExecuteCommandResponse","version":"v4","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000019","code":0,"message":"success","data":[]},"title":"CommandExecuteResponse"},"examples":{"commandFailed":{"value":{"type":"ExecuteCommandResponse","version":"v4","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecf9","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"HubCoordination","commandCode":"APIBindSubdeviceWithSecurityCode","code":2201,"message":"invalid security
